title: Attention Is All You Need
abstract: The dominant sequence transduction models are based on complex recurrent or convolutional neural networks.

title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers
abstract: We introduce a new language representation model called BERT.

title: GPT-4 Technical Report
abstract: We report the development of GPT-4, a large-scale, multimodal model.

title: A Survey on Large Language Models
abstract: Large language models have shown remarkable capabilities in natural language understanding.

title: Constitutional AI: Harmlessness from AI Feedback
abstract: We propose a method for training a harmless AI assistant through self-improvement.

title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks
abstract: We explore a general-purpose fine-tuning recipe for retrieval-augmented generation.

title: Chain-of-Thought Prompting Elicits Reasoning in Large Language Models
abstract: We explore how generating a chain of thought improves the ability of LLMs to perform complex reasoning.

title: LoRA: Low-Rank Adaptation of Large Language Models
abstract: We propose Low-Rank Adaptation for large language model fine-tuning.

title: 교육 분야에서의 인공지능 활용에 관한 연구
abstract: 본 연구는 한국 대학교육에서 AI 기반 학습 지원 시스템의 효과를 분석한다.

title: 한국어 자연어처리를 위한 사전학습 언어모델 비교 연구
abstract: KoBERT, KoGPT 등 한국어 사전학습 모델의 성능을 비교 분석한다.
